name: pension-data-mac-desktop
description: Tauri-first desktop shell for Pension-Data workspace

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync:web-ui && npm run validate:contract && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync:web-ui && npm run validate:contract && tauri build --bundles app
scripts.electron:dev: npm run sync:web-ui && npm run validate:contract && electron electron/main.mjs
